rationale_source: F2.AC exit path: broker provides collateral details → collateral_offered=true → workflow transitions from awaiting_collateral → active

collateral_offered.rationale: Event-1 collateralOffer message provides 2nd property as additional security; F2.AC collateral_offered flag set.

workflow_state.rationale: F2.AC exit path: collateral_offered=true transitions back to active per R10-C-1 inverse.

outbound_emails.rationale: After F2.AC exit, standard prelim path resumes.
